tasks.subject: Spec models: LoraSwapCell + LoraStackEntry + GridCell mutex + on_swap_failure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py` so a YAML spec can declare `lora_swap:` cells alongside existing `generate:` / `path:` cells, and so `GridSpec` carries a whole-grid `on_swap_failure` knob. Register every `lora_swap.stack[*].ref` with `RedactionRegistry`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py`
- Test: `tests/core/grid/test_spec_lora_swap.py` (NEW)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- LoraStackEntry with strength range [-1.0, 2.0] + branch literal
- LoraSwapCell with extra=forbid + empty-stack legal
- GridCell 3-way mutex (generate/path/lora_swap)
- GridSpec.on_swap_failure literal default classify
- lora_swap refs registered with RedactionRegistry

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_spec_lora_swap.py -v`

Plan doc: §Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py", "tests/core/grid/test_spec_lora_swap.py", "tests/core/grid/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_spec_lora_swap.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LoraStackEntry model with strength range and branch literal", "LoraSwapCell model with config + stack list", "GridCell 3-way mutex enforced", "GridSpec.on_swap_failure literal field", "lora_swap refs registered with RedactionRegistry"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Grouping: WarmAttachKey derivation for lora_swap cells
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `_cell_capability_key` to dispatch on cell type so `lora_swap:` cells group by `WarmAttachKey(base, engine, precision)` only.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py` (`_ResolvedCell`, `_cell_capability_key`, `_resolve_spec_cells`)
- Test: `tests/core/grid/test_grouping_lora_swap.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Two swap cells with same WAK share group
- Swap + generate with same WAK go to different groups
- Path cells stay under sentinel
- Different precision splits swap group

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_grouping_lora_swap.py tests/core/grid/ -v`

Plan doc: §Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py", "tests/core/grid/test_grouping_lora_swap.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_grouping_lora_swap.py tests/core/grid/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["same WAK groups", "swap+gen different groups", "path under sentinel", "precision splits"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: CLI: --attach-pod flag with ledger validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `--attach-pod <id>` to `kinoforge generate`. Ledger validation (exists + running + WarmAttachKey match). Skip provision; route HTTP backend at ledger endpoint_url. Mutex with --no-reuse + --emit-provision-record.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`, `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py`
- Test: `tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py` (~8 tests)
- Add: fixtures in `tests/cli/conftest.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- --attach-pod + --no-reuse exit 1
- --attach-pod + --emit-provision-record exit 1
- ledger-missing exit 1
- non-running status exit 1
- WarmAttachKey mismatch exit 1
- happy-path skips provision + routes endpoint + --loras flows through

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py tests/cli/ -v`

Distinct from existing --instance-id (which uses full CapabilityKey + matcher classify rejections).

Plan doc: §Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py", "tests/cli/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py tests/cli/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--attach-pod + --no-reuse mutex", "--attach-pod + --emit-provision-record mutex", "ledger-missing exit 1", "non-running status exit 1", "WarmAttachKey mismatch exit 1", "happy path skips provision"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: CLI: --emit-provision-record flag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `--emit-provision-record <path>` to `kinoforge generate`. On successful provision write JSON {pod_id, endpoint_url, provider, warm_attach_key, provision_ts}. Local TZ per `feedback_local_timezone_only`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py`, `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`
- Test: covered by Task 3 tests

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 5 keys written on success
- file NOT written on provision failure
- provision_ts is local TZ ISO-8601
- warm_attach_key matches WarmAttachKey.derive()

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py::test_attach_pod_emit_provision_record_happy_path_writes_json -v`

Plan doc: §Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_generate_attach_pod.py::test_attach_pod_emit_provision_record_happy_path_writes_json -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["JSON 5 keys", "not written on failure", "local TZ", "WAK matches"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Executor: _run_swap_group + run_grid dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New async `_run_swap_group` driving cell-1 cold-boot via `kinoforge generate --loras --emit-provision-record`, then cells 2..N via `kinoforge generate --attach-pod --loras`. try/finally teardown + residual probe. `_classify_swap_failure` on non-zero exit.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py`
- Test: `tests/core/grid/test_executor_swap_group.py` (~6)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cell-1 argv has --loras + --emit-provision-record; no --attach-pod; no --no-reuse
- cells 2..N argv has --attach-pod + --loras; no --emit-provision-record; no --no-reuse
- destroy in finally on success
- destroy in finally on abort
- residual probe surfaces teardown
- budget cap-trip marks remaining killed

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_executor_swap_group.py tests/core/grid/ -v`

Plan doc: §Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py", "tests/core/grid/test_executor_swap_group.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_executor_swap_group.py tests/core/grid/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cell-1 argv", "cells 2..N argv", "destroy in finally success", "destroy in finally abort", "residual probe", "budget cap-trip"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Failure taxonomy: swap_failures.py module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New module exporting `SwapFailureAction` enum + `_classify_swap_failure(stderr, exit_code, policy)`. Pattern-match P2 structured errors + transient HTTP + OOM exit 137. Retry budget = 3 × 5s backoff.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/swap_failures.py`
- Test: `tests/core/grid/test_swap_failures.py` (~9)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SwapFailureAction enum RETRY/CONTINUE/ABORT
- strict always ABORT
- classify routes correctly per pattern table
- continue ABORTs on truly unrecoverable
- RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3, RETRY_BACKOFF_S=5.0

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_swap_failures.py -v`

Plan doc: §Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/swap_failures.py", "tests/core/grid/test_swap_failures.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_swap_failures.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enum", "strict aborts", "classify routes", "continue aborts unrecoverable", "constants"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Cost sidecar writer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `CostSidecarBuilder` class — per-group wall-clock cost tracking; writes `<grid_out>.cost.json` per spec §6 schema. Always written.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/cost_sidecar.py`
- Test: `tests/core/grid/test_cost_sidecar.py` (~5)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- start_group records provision_ts
- record_cell appends cell
- mark_cell_error sets status + error
- total_cost sums across groups
- write emits schema; spec_path redacted via Registry
- sidecar always written (empty groups OK)

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_cost_sidecar.py -v`

Plan doc: §Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/cost_sidecar.py", "tests/core/grid/test_cost_sidecar.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/grid/test_cost_sidecar.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["start_group", "record_cell", "mark_cell_error", "total cost", "spec_path redact", "always written"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Tier-3 live fire: happy-path + forced-failure sweeps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two Tier-3 live fires on Wan 2.1 1.3B (RunPod). Cumulative ≤ $0.50.

**Files:** Live invocation. PROGRESS.md update inline.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- happy-path 3 sha-distinct mp4s, composed grid, sidecar.json, cost ≤ $0.30
- forced-failure exit 2, cell-2 failed, cell-3 ok, cost ≤ $0.20
- post-fire `kinoforge list` empty

**Verify:** Manual inspection of mp4 + sidecar + `pixi run kinoforge list`

Memory: `feedback_use_no_reuse_for_one_shots`, `feedback_proactive_pod_stats`, `feedback_run_tests_yourself`, `feedback_standard_test_prompt`.

Plan doc: §Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy-path 3 distinct shas cost ≤ $0.30", "forced-failure exit 2 cell-2 failed cell-3 ok cost ≤ $0.20", "ledger empty"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Tier-4 live fire: 3-cell Arcane strength sweep + successful-generations.md amend
tasks.description:

**Files:** Live invocation. Modify `successful-generations.md` (§11 See also) + `PROGRESS.md`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 3 sha-distinct mp4s on Wan 2.2 14B Arcane pair, cost ≤ $1.50
